{{CargoOrgan
|name=Buddhic Appendix
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10876
|idx=83
|description=On his sacred journey to the West, the Tang monk suffered a bout of appendicitis and had the organ removed. Left to bask in daily sutra chanting, the discarded appendix gradually achieved enlightenment. The monk, moved by its devotion, gave it a Dharma name: Inflammasattva.
|skill=
|hp=2714
|def=223
|atk=158
|rush=192
|gene1=When HP is below 30%, DMG dealt +7.5%
|gene2=Angel Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|gene3=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +3%
|gene4=Angel Minion Cloning SPD +3%
|gene5=Domain Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Angel Minion Recovery SPD +6% (Awakened)
|}}
